briefs.title: Short-Term Rental Registration Rules Clarified: Suites, Seasonal Units, and Platform Listings
briefs.summary: BC updated its short-term rental rules to exempt seasonal properties not suitable for year-round living, and to clarify that each suite or secondary unit needs its own registration, while one registration covers all platform listings for the same unit.
briefs.action_required: Check if each of your rental suites or accessory units has its own short-term rental registration.

key_dates.label: BC Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation amendments take effect
